requirement.zh: 左侧由上到下显示1–7个智能体阶段。
requirement.en: Display 7 numbered Agent stages vertically from top to bottom.

implementationNote: Use a fixed/scrollable left rail; active stage highlighted.

requirement.zh: 中间为主要功能窗口：对话、查体/开单、诊断、MDT、治疗、围术期、复盘。
requirement.en: The center panel shows the active function: interview, exam/order, diagnosis, MDT, treatment, perioperative, debrief.

requirement.zh: 进入病例后按顺序往下推进。
requirement.en: After entering a case, learner proceeds in stage order 1→2→3→4→5→6→7.

implementationNote: Allow review of obtained information but not locked answers.

requirement.zh: 右上角设置中加入中英切换。
requirement.en: Add a Chinese/English switch at the top-right settings area.

implementationNote: Persist language in localStorage; all labels use i18n dictionary.

requirement.zh: 提交前隐藏病例特异得分点、漏项、标准答案和诊断提示。
requirement.en: Before submission, hide case-specific scoring points, missed items, standard answers and diagnosis clues.

requirement.zh: 患者问一点答一点，只回答匹配slot，1–2条短句。
requirement.en: Patient answers one question at a time, only the matched slot, in 1–2 short bullet points.

implementationNote: Never return full symptoms_detail or medical_history.

requirement.zh: 开了什么检查才返回什么结果。
requirement.en: Investigation Agent returns results only after the learner orders the corresponding test.

requirement.zh: OSCE模式不显示提示或即时反馈，结束后统一复盘。
requirement.en: No hints or immediate feedback in OSCE mode; show debrief after completion.

implementationNote: Add mode flag and feedback gating.

requirement.zh: 最终复盘包含时间线、得分、能力画像、漏项、危险错误和学习建议。
requirement.en: Final debrief includes timeline, scores, competency profile, missed items, unsafe errors and learning advice.
